description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian, partially visible beneath a large, smooth, and angular overhanging structure. The figure's head and upper torso are discernible, with a human face and short hair, while the rest of the body is obscured by the surrounding geometric forms. The visible portion of the person appears to be wearing a collared garment, possibly a jacket or coat, with a high neckline. The surrounding environment is dominated by large, faceted surfaces in shades of red and pink, which seem to envelop or intersect the figure. The overall scene gives the impression of a person partially emerging from or trapped within abstract architectural elements. The figure's posture is upright, but the lower body and legs are not visible due to occlusion.
description: An adult pedestrian with a visible head and upper torso, partially obscured by large, angular red and pink structures. The figure appears upright and is wearing a collared garment.
description_view_0: The head and upper torso of the pedestrian are visible beneath a pink overhang, with the face and short hair clearly seen.
description_view_1: The figure is mostly hidden between deep red angular surfaces, with only a small portion of the head and shoulder visible.
description_view_2: The pedestrian's head and part of the upper body are seen from a distance, mostly covered by the pink structure above.
description_view_3: A side view showing the head and a bit of the upper torso peeking out from between two red, faceted surfaces.
